h1: Custom Golf Products for Branded Corporate Giveaways
metaDescription: Shop custom golf products for corporate giveaways. Perfect for tournaments, client gifts, and employee appreciation. Fast turnaround. Order today!
introHtml:
Spring and summer bring conference season, charity golf tournaments, and team-building outings. It is also the time when companies start planning their year-end client appreciation gifts. Custom golf products offer a memorable way to thank clients, reward employees, or promote your brand at events.

Perfect Imprints stocks a wide range of customizable golf items, from the Golf Buddy and Gold Golf Kit to golf towels, umbrellas, and tee carriers. Whether you need 50 units for a small tournament or 500 for a large corporate outing, we can handle orders of any size. Our decoration options include screen printing, embroidery, laser engraving, and full-color digital print, so you can match your brand colors and logo exactly.

When you order custom golf products from Perfect Imprints, you get high-quality items that recipients will actually use. Golfers appreciate useful gear like the 60 Arc Golf Umbrella or the Rugged 7-in-1 Golf Tool. Non-golfers can still enjoy branded towels, shoe bags, and umbrellas. Every product is built to last, ensuring your logo gets repeated exposure on the course and beyond.

faqs.q: What is the minimum order quantity for custom golf products?
faqs.a: Minimum order quantities vary by product. Many items like golf towels and umbrellas have MOQs as low as 50 units. Smaller runs may be available for certain products. Contact our sales team for specific MOQs on the items you are interested in.

faqs.q: Can I get a sample before placing a bulk order?
faqs.a: Yes, we offer samples for most of our custom golf products. You can order a blank sample to check quality, size, and material. Once approved, we move forward with the full order. Sample fees are often credited back on larger orders.

faqs.q: What decoration methods are available for golf products?
faqs.a: We offer screen printing, embroidery, laser engraving, and full-color digital print. For golf towels, screen printing or embroidery work best. For golf tools and keyholders, laser engraving provides a clean, permanent mark. Umbrellas are typically screen printed.

faqs.q: What is the typical production lead time for custom golf items?
faqs.a: Standard production lead time is 7-10 business days after artwork approval. Rush orders can be accommodated for an additional fee. We recommend placing orders at least 3-4 weeks before your event to allow for shipping and any delays.

faqs.q: Are there size or color options for the golf towels?
faqs.a: Yes. Our golf towels come in various sizes, including 16x25 inches and larger. Color options vary by product. For example, the ColorFusion Golf Towel offers a wide range of vibrant colors. Check the product page for specific available colors and sizes.

heroAltText: Custom golf products including golf towels, umbrellas, and golf tools with company logos.
